word.definition: Tortuous describes something that has many literal or figurative twists and turns.

sports_fact.text: On May 15, 1941, Joe DiMaggio singled against the White Sox — the quiet start of his 56-game hitting streak, a record that has stood for more than 80 years.

market.headline: Stock Market Today: 30-Year Bond Yield Hits Highest Level Since 2007
market.summary: Stocks sink on oil fears, with Brent crude rising above $109

quote.text: The real sin against life is to abuse and destroy beauty, even one's own — even more, one's own, for that has been put in our care and we are responsible for its well-being.
quote.author: Katherine Anne Porter

history.text: World War II: In the United States, a bill creating the Women's Army Auxiliary Corps (WAAC) is signed into law.
